title: ClearingServiceTypeValues
description: Provides records of cleared transactions for audit, reconciliation, and regulatory reporting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Validation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verifies transaction details (amount, parties, instruments) to ensure correctness and completeness.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Matching & Confirmation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Matches transaction instructions between counterparties to confirm agreement on trade details.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Netting of Obligations Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Aggregates and offsets multiple transactions to determine net payable or receivable positions, reducing the number of settlements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Management Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Applies controls such as margin requirements, collateral checks, and exposure limits to reduce counterparty risk.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Preparation for Settlement Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Prepares transactions for final settlement by determining who owes what to whom.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Intermediary Role Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Often involves clearing houses or central counterparties (CCPs) that act as intermediaries between buyers and sellers.
